headline: Aptiv and Comau to Co-Develop Next-Generation Solutions for Robotics, Autonomous Systems, and Industrial Logistics
summary: SCHAFFHAUSEN, Switzerland & TURIN, Italy, May 05, 2026--Aptiv PLC (NYSE: APTV), a global industrial technology leader, and Comau, a worldwide leader in industrial automation, today announced a collaboration to explore the co-development of next-generation intelligent automation solutions designed to help industrial customers operate more safely, efficiently, and autonomously. headline: Aptiv Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
summary: SCHAFFHAUSEN, Switzerland, May 05, 2026--Aptiv PLC (NYSE: APTV), a global industrial technology company, today reported financial results for the first quarter of 2026. These results include the Electrical Distribution systems ("EDS") business, which completed its spin-off into a new publicly traded company, Versigent, on April 1, 2026.

headline: Aptiv Q1 Adj. EPS $1.71 Beats $1.57 Estimate, Sales $5.086B Beat $5.035B Estimate
